characters.appearance: Young adult woman, medium build, brown complexion, long dark hair worn loose. She has expressive facial features and a warm smile.
characters.wardrobe: White and maroon sleeveless top with a collar, paired with blue jeans.
characters.demeanor: Enthusiastic, expressive, and persuasive, maintaining strong eye contact.

characters.appearance: Young adult woman, brown complexion, dark hair tied back neatly. Her features are slightly rigid.
characters.wardrobe: Dark blue blazer over a light blue collared shirt.

scenes.scene_label: Presenter introduces the problem and solution
scenes.supernova_script:
Character A says: क्या आपको भी लगता है कि इंग्लिश ना बोल पाने की वजह से आप पीछे छूट रहे हैं? [Do you also feel that you are being left behind because you can't speak English?]
Character A says: इंग्लिश सीखना मुश्किल नहीं है, बस रोज़ practice की ज़रूरत है। [Learning English is not difficult, it just needs daily practice.]
Character A says: लेकिन सबसे बड़ी problem क्या है? [But what is the biggest problem?]
Character A says: हम practice किसके साथ करें? कोई ऐसा दोस्त ही नहीं मिलता जो इंग्लिश में बात करे। [Who do we practice with? We don't find any friend who talks in English.]
Character A says: और यही hesitation हमें आगे बढ़ने से रोकती है। [And this hesitation stops us from moving forward.]
Character A says: लेकिन tension मत लो, इसका एक पक्का solution है— Supernova ऐप। [But don't take tension, there is a solid solution for this— the Supernova app.]
scenes.scene_summary:
- Hooks the viewer by addressing the common fear of being left behind due to poor spoken English.
- Validates the core problem: knowing the language but lacking a partner to practice with.
- Introduces Supernova as the practical, stress-free solution.
scenes.supernova_on_screen_text: Kya aapko bhi lagta hai ki English na bol paane ki wajah se aap peeche chhoot rahe hain? English seekhna mushkil nahi hai, bas roz practice ki zaroorat hai. Lekin sabse badi problem kya hai? Hum practice kiske saath karein? Koi aisa dost hi nahi milta jo English mein baat kare. Aur yahi hesitation humein aage badhne se rokti hai. Lekin tension mat lo, iska ek pakka solution hai— Supernova App.

scenes.supernova_script: Character A says: इस ऐप में आपको मिलेगा आपका अपना AI tutor, जो बिल्कुल एक दोस्त की तरह बात करता है। [In this app you will get your own AI tutor, who talks exactly like a friend.]
scenes.scene_summary:
- Visually demonstrates the AI tutor interface.
- Positions the AI as a friendly, accessible speaking partner rather than a strict teacher.
scenes.supernova_on_screen_text: Is app mein aapko milega aapka apna AI tutor.

scenes.supernova_script:
Character A says: आप इंटरव्यू की तैयारी कर रहे हों या कस्टमर से बात करनी हो, ये AI tutor आपकी गलतियों को बिना judge किए सही करेगा। [Whether you are preparing for an interview or need to talk to a customer, this AI tutor will correct your mistakes without judging you.]
Character A says: आप इसके साथ real-life situations में इंग्लिश बोलने की practice कर सकते हैं। [You can practice speaking English in real-life situations with it.]
Character A says: चाहे आप घर पर हों, ऑफिस में, या बस में सफर कर रहे हों। [Whether you are at home, in the office, or traveling in a bus.]
Character A says: रोज़ सिर्फ 15-20 मिनट practice कीजिए। [Just practice for 15-20 minutes daily.]
Character A says: धीरे-धीरे आपकी fluency और confidence दोनों बढ़ जाएंगे। [Gradually both your fluency and confidence will increase.]
Character A says: अब इंग्लिश से डरने की कोई ज़रूरत नहीं है। [Now there is no need to be afraid of English.]
Character A says: एक बार बोलना शुरू करो, रास्ते अपने आप खुल जाएंगे। [Start speaking once, the paths will open up on their own.]
Character A says: तो सोच क्या रहे हो? आज ही Supernova ऐप डाउनलोड करो और कॉन्फिडेंस के साथ इंग्लिश बोलना शुरू करो! [So what are you thinking? Download the Supernova app today and start speaking English with confidence!]
scenes.scene_summary:
- Highlights key Supernova features: real-world scenario practice (interviews, customers) and judgment-free corrections.
- Emphasizes convenience and realistic goals (15-20 mins daily, anywhere) instead of overpromising a 15-day miracle.
- Ends with an encouraging, pressure-free call to action to download the app.
scenes.supernova_on_screen_text: Aap interview ki taiyari kar rahe hon ya customer se baat karni ho, ye AI tutor aapki galtiyon ko bina judge kiye sahi karega. Aap iske saath real-life situations mein English bolne ki practice kar sakte hain. Chahe aap ghar par hon, office mein, ya bus mein safar kar rahe hon. Roz sirf 15-20 minute practice kijiye. Dheere-dheere aapki fluency aur confidence dono badh jayenge. Ab English se darne ki koi zaroorat nahi hai. Ek baar bolna shuru karo, raaste apne aap khul jayenge. Toh soch kya rahe ho? Aaj hi Supernova App DOWNLOAD karo aur confidence ke saath English bolna shuru karo!
